reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) skill will improve my reasoning process and accuracy for all future questions. Since I have 1 SP available and higher-level doors can replenish my SP quickly, this is a high-value investment.

Unlocking 'pe_plan' is a priority as it grants a Reflection skill (+1 call after the answer) which provides a crucial safety net to verify and correct answers before they are finalized, reducing the risk of HP loss.
